name: Yo Moma a slut joke=Real
description:
Your bully makes a "Yo mama a slut" joke, except it isn't a joke, but more an accurate description of how your stepmom is servicing all your high school classmates. Your mom is otherwise sweet and wonderful to you.

Will you embrace your stepmom for who she is...or do you feel too uncomfortable with how all your friends are teasing you about dumping their loads in your mom?
creator: VRCat
